race.comment: Open race to close out the card with many scratched. THANKYOU HENRY (2) returned in good order with a close-up third at the Sunny Coast and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Is a two-time winner over this trip, gets 3kg off with the claim and draws favourably in gate two. Plenty to like about his prospects. EXCENIA (13) has hit the frame in four of her past five outings and looks to be building up to another victory. Ready to peak now third-up and shouldn't be discounted lightly. PETITE PALACE (3) hasn't been too far away in recent runs, the latest offering a sixth over 1100m at Ipswich three weeks ago. Well placed in this line-up and can feature. ESPRIT DU JOUR (16) is stepping out at this course for the first time. Last appeared when she finished third over 1200m at Ipswich on May 13. Racing well and include in all combos.
